description: Engine message with payload (§51.0.S.6). A click calls @drag.advance(.Start(7)); the .Start(id) arm transitions Idle -> Dragging(id) carrying the id payload. The snapshot preserves it as { variant: "Dragging", data: { id: 7 } }.
rationale: §51.0.S.6 a payload-bearing message (.Start(7)) flows its payload into the target state's payload slot (.Dragging(7)); the id survives the dispatch into the cell snapshot.
